subject.description: An avant-garde, high-fashion creative director wearing an impeccably tailored, minimalist black suit. Their expression is cold and unbothered.
subject.action: Standing next to a glowing, sleek modern 'autopilot' dashboard interface. They are casually wrapping thick, beautiful red velvet caution tape around the dashboard, rendering it completely useless.

setting.location: A minimalist, high-end studio environment with a simple white pedestal.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave clear headspace above the subject's hair, and do not cut off their hands as they wrap the tape.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field, meaning the background is completely blurred.

lighting.color_grading: High contrast, deep elegant shadows, cinematic, high-end editorial.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cartoon, illustration, low quality, cluttered background, cut flesh, badly cropped head.
